prompt: Cutoff opened and hero is on the button with KQo. Which compact preflop action fits best for the first World 3 checkpoint?
why_v1: Facing a cutoff open, KQo on the button keeps enough value to continue by calling in position.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Facing a cutoff open, KQo plays well enough to continue, and calling keeps position without bloating the pot.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Once the cutoff opens first, KQo plays better as an in-position call: you keep a playable broadway hand in the pot without bloating it into a thin raise against stronger opening ranges.
